---
title: "Infrastructure"
aliases: 
    - "/infrastructure.html"
---

{{< include /_common.qmd >}}

![](../images/about/CARDAT_infrastructure_overview_v2.png){fig-alt="CARDAT infrastructure overview"}

CARDAT maintains a collection of infrastructure assets to support air quality and health research. Where possible, data and software adheres to the [FAIR principles](https://ardc.edu.au/resource-hub/making-data-fair/) - Findable, Accessible, Interoperable and Reusable. Data and software are shared through the following systems:

- [**Cloud CARDAT**][cardat-data-repo], a cloud-based data storage system
- **PostGIS_CAR**, a PostgreSQL database with PostGIS extension storing a subset of geospatial data
- [**CARDAT GitHub repository**][cardat-gh], a collection of software, such as code tools, R packages, and scientific workflows, plus documentation through GitHub pages
- [**CoESRA**][coesra-home] platform, a cloud-based virtual desktop service provided by [TERN][tern-home], which holds a subset of the CARDAT repository and provides a space for researchers to perform data analyses.

The data and software assets held by CARDAT are catalogued in the [**CARDAT Data Inventory**][cardat-data-inventory], in addition to potential datasets and tools of interest held elsewhere.
